name: hbcf-social-media
description: Draft Facebook and Instagram posts, generate branded graphics, process photos, and prepare Publer CSV bulk uploads for the Hitchin Beer & Cider Festival. Covers the full visual template library, photo treatment workflow (HEIC, square crop, hedgehog watermark), parsing of teammate Word-doc drafts, and image-vs-video posting strategy. Triggers on HBCF post requests, sponsor thanks, countdown posts, photo watermarking, event-day carousels, and Publer CSV preparation.
